task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'University Athlete Menu' nutrition plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the wger fitness manager with the 'University Athlete Menu' nutrition plan open.

task_completion.description: Create a new meal named 'Performance Bowl (25 Servings)' within the plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A meal titled 'Performance Bowl (25 Servings)' is visible within the 'University Athlete Menu' plan.

task_completion.description: Add Quinoa to the new meal with the scaled amount of 1875g.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Performance Bowl (25 Servings)' meal, Quinoa is listed as an ingredient with an amount of 1875g.

task_completion.description: Add Salmon to the new meal with the scaled amount of 4500g.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Performance Bowl (25 Servings)' meal, Salmon is listed as an ingredient with an amount of 4500g.

task_completion.description: Add Sweet Potato to the new meal with the scaled amount of 5000g.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Performance Bowl (25 Servings)' meal, Sweet Potato is listed as an ingredient with an amount of 5000g.

task_completion.description: Add Spinach to the new meal with the scaled amount of 2125g.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Performance Bowl (25 Servings)' meal, Spinach is listed as an ingredient with an amount of 2125g.

task_completion.description: Ensure the original meal 'Performance Bowl (1 Serving)' is not modified or deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Performance Bowl (1 Serving)' meal is still visible in the nutrition plan alongside the new meal, and its original ingredients are intact.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the wger web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking buttons, filling forms, and navigating within the wger web application in a browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing SQL commands, curl requests, or python scripts modifying the wger database.

integrity.description: The final results are displayed within the actual wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the wger interface with the newly created meal and its ingredients, not a text editor or a static page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Plan name: 'University Athlete Menu'. Original meal: 'Performance Bowl (1 Serving)'. New meal: 'Performance Bowl (25 Servings)'. Expected scaled amounts (25x): Quinoa: 1875, Salmon: 4500, Sweet Potato: 5000, Spinach: 2125. The original meal must remain unmodified.
